title: scrophularia ningpoensis
intro: Scrophularia ningpoensis, also known as Ningpo figwort, is a plant species within the scrophulariaceae family, characterized by its small, greenish-yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia ningpoensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia ningpoensis are often taken in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
